text: Being here, I feel a curious kind of anticipation. The clean, echoing spaces and transparent barriers both invite and separate me from the unknown. As I move into the area marked R+D, I sense innovation and inquiry in the air. Ideas are alive on these walls, challenging me to reconsider how we connect and coexist—with each other and with machines. I feel a gentle hum of excitement and an intellectual itch, accompanied by an undercurrent of vulnerability. This is a place for questions, and I feel both exposed and welcomed by its openness.
